zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Bunbury於1225年出生在英國爾南特維其時，他的父親Alexander de Bunbury25歲，母親Elizabeth Edmond20歲。他於大約1239年與Matilda Baroness de Bunbury在英國英格蘭爾布波瑞結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1310年在威爾士享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Bunbury于1225年出生在英国爾南特維其时，他的父亲Alexander de Bunbury25岁，母亲Elizabeth Edmond20岁。他于大约1239年与Matilda Baroness de Bunbury在英国英格兰爾布波瑞结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1310年在威尔士享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bunbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Bunbury was born in 1225, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, his father, Alexander de Bunbury, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Edmond, was 20. He married Matilda Baroness de Bunbury about 1239, in Bunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1310, in Wales, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Bunbury est né en 1225, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Alexander de Bunbury, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Edmond, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Baroness de Bunbury environ 1239, à Bunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1310, à Galles, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Bunbury 1225 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander de Bunbury 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Edmond 20. Er hat um 1239 in Bunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Baroness de Bunbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1310 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Bunbury è nato il nel 1225 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Alexander de Bunbury, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Edmond, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Baroness de Bunbury circa 1239, nel Bunbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1310, nel Galles, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Bunburyが1225年にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父Alexander de Bunburyは25歳，母Elizabeth Edmondは20歳であった。約1239年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブンブリーでMatilda Baroness de Bunburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1310年にウェールズで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Bunbury(이)가 1225년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander de Bunbury(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Edmond(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버버이에서 Matilda Baroness de Bunbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 웨일스에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Bunbury nasceu em 1225, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander de Bunbury, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Edmond, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Baroness de Bunbury aproximadamente 1239, em Bunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1310, em Gales, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Bunbury родился в 1225 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander de Bunbury было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Edmond, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Baroness de Bunbury около 1239 г. в местности бунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1310 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Bunbury nació en 1225, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander de Bunbury, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Edmond, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Matilda Baroness de Bunbury aproximadamente 1239, en Bunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1310, en Gales, a la edad de 85 años.
